SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AppNavigator
Central navigation entry point for the JavaFX app.
AppSession
Singleton session holder for the currently logged-in employee.
Controller
Common interface for FXML controllers that receive an injected screen model.
CouldNotLoadScene
Fallback scene shown when a normal FXML scene cannot be loaded.
CreateOrderController
Controller for the Create Restock Order view.
Employee
Immutable record representing a system employee.
EmployeeEditController
Controller for the Employee Edit view.
HourlySalesRow
Simple hourly sales aggregate for X-report charting.
Ingredient
Immutable record representing a single ingredient in the inventory.
IngredientStock
Represents a lightweight ingredient stock snapshot used by the Manager Dashboard stock panel.
IngredientUsageRow
Immutable result row from an ingredient usage query.
ItemIngredient
 
ItemSalesRow
Represents sales totals for a single menu item across a reporting period.
LoginModel
Model for validating login credentials against the database.
LoginPageController
Controller for the login screen.
Main
JavaFX application entry point for the point-of-sale system.
ManagerActionsController
Controller for the Manager Actions hub view.
ManagerActionsModel
Model for the Manager Actions family of views (menu item editing, employee management, and ingredient access).
ManagerController
JavaFX controller for the manager dashboard view.
ManagerModel
Model implementation backing the manager dashboard and reporting views.
MenuItem
 
MenuItemEditController
Controller for the Menu Item Edit view.
Model
Marker interface for MVC model types used by JavaFX controllers in the application.
MonthlySales
 
OrderDetailController
Controller for the Order Detail view.
OrderInventoryController
Controller for the Order Inventory view.
OrderInventoryModel
Model for the Order Inventory family of views (order list, order detail, and create order).
OrderItem
 
OrderPageController
 
OrderPageModel
Model class for managing the order page logic.
POSDatabase
 
ProductUsageController
Controller for the Product Usage view.
ProductUsageModel
Model for the Product Usage view.
RestockOrder
Immutable record representing a restock order placed by a manager.
RestockOrderItem
Immutable record representing a single line item within a RestockOrder.
SceneLoader
Small builder for loading FXML scenes and injecting the screen model.
SensitiveData
Reads database connection settings from environment-backed configuration.
SQLServerPOSDatabase
JDBC-backed POSDatabase implementation used by the JavaFX POS app.
TimeBucketSales
Represents aggregated sales total for a reporting bucket beginning on a specific date.
XReportController
Controller for the X-report screen.
XReportModel
Read-only model for the in-progress X-report dashboard.
ZReportController
Controller for the Z-report screen.
ZReportModel
Model for previewing, generating, and reviewing Z-reports.
ZReportSummary
Summary record for a generated or previewed Z-report.
